description: Experience the future of sophisticated driving with the stunning 2025 Mazda CX-30 2.5 S Preferred in Soul Red Crystal Metallic. As a gently-driven former service loaner from Huntington Beach Mazda, a proud Orange County Top Workplace Winner, this crossover comes with the confidence of our award-winning dealership's meticulous maintenance standards.  According to CARFAX, this vehicle comes with a pristine history, showing no accidents or damage reported since new. The CARFAX report verifies the mileage accuracy and confirms a clean title history, giving you complete confidence in this vehicle's background. Best of all, it's still protected under the original manufacturer's warranty, making this a worry-free choice for your next vehicle.  Step into a world where luxury meets everyday practicality. The premium synthetic seats with heating capabilities make every morning commute feel like a first-class experience, while the leather-wrapped steering wheel adds a touch of sophistication to your daily drive. The dual LCD monitors provide crystal-clear information and entertainment access, seamlessly connecting your digital life through Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration.  Weekend adventures take on new meaning with this CX-30's versatile capabilities. The automatic full-time all-wheel drive system confidently handles everything from coastal drives to mountain getaways, while the spacious cargo area, illuminated by thoughtful cargo space lights, accommodates all your gear. The Soul Red Crystal Metallic paint catches the sunlight in ways that'll make you look back every time you park.  Safety becomes second nature with an impressive suite of driver assistance features. The comprehensive airbag system, blind spot monitoring, and front collision mitigation work together to keep your precious cargo protected. Lane departure warning and cross-traffic alert systems act as your vigilant co-pilot, while the adaptive cruise control makes long highway drives more relaxing than ever.  The perfect blend of technology and convenience surrounds you in the cabin. Multi-zone climate control ensures everyone's comfort, while the smart device integration with WiFi hotspot capability keeps you connected wherever your journey takes you. The power moonroof opens up to starlit drives, and the rain-sensing wipers automatically adjust to changing weather conditions, letting you focus on the road ahead.  Ready to make this vehicle yours? Visit us at Huntington Beach Mazda, located at 16882 Beach Blvd, Huntington Beach, CA 92647. Give us a call at 714-848-7739 or explore our inventory online at https://www.huntingtonbeachmazda.com/. description: Why BUY from Clark Nissan Abilene?    When you choose this RED 2025 hyundai Tucson SEL with 15,837 miles for $24,399, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!    No Accidents!     One Owner!   What this vehicle includes:    Option Group 01        Convenience Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring       Come on in to Clark Nissan Abilene today at 818 E Overland Trail Abilene TX 79601 or call 325-313-6373 to schedule a test drive!

description: This  2025 FORD TRUCK ESCAPE ST-LINE, has a AGATE BLACK exterior and an EBONY VYNL interior color. 15,849 miles.  Stock Number AC7765. You can connect  with us by calling .     No Accidents!  One Owner!    OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Daytime Running Lights ($45 value)    Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     All of our vehicles comes with Miracle Pro Plus. Ask Sales for details. At Miracle Buick GMC of Kutztown, we're here to Serve you!  Our staff is 100% dedicated to customer satisfaction and we understand that you need clear, transparent information throughout the car buying process.  With our live market pricing philosophy, we offer the right cars at the right price, and the transparency to back it up!

description: Discover the Versatile and Sophisticated 2025 Mazda CX-50 2.5 S Premium Package  This stunning 2025 Mazda CX-50 2.5 S Premium Package is the perfect blend of style, capability, and advanced technology. With its sleek blue exterior, this CX-50 not only turns heads but also delivers exceptional performance and comfort.   Trailer Hitch w/4-Pin Harness  Weather Package  Silver Cross Bars  Under the hood, the SKYACTIV® 2.5L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine paired with a 6-Speed Automatic transmission and Mazda's renowned AWD system provides a thrilling and efficient driving experience. Boasting an impressive 25 MPG in the city and 31 MPG on the highway, this CX-50 offers the perfect balance of power and fuel efficiency.  Stepping inside, you'll be surrounded by premium features that elevate your driving experience. The 12-speaker Bose audio system, dual-zone automatic climate control, and heated front seats ensure your comfort and convenience. The power liftgate and 60/40 split-folding rear seats provide versatile cargo-carrying capabilities, making this CX-50 an ideal companion for your active lifestyle.  Safety is also a top priority, with advanced features like Mazda Connect, an Exterior Parking Camera Rear, and a suite of airbags to keep you and your loved ones protected on the road.  Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and technology in this 2025 Mazda CX-50 2.5 S Premium Package. Visit Route 9 Mazda in Poughkeepsie, NY, and experience the difference for yourself. Every certified and pre-owned vehicle at Route 9 Mazda undergoes a thorough inspection to ensure reliability, safety, and long-term value. Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. description: Discover the ultimate blend of capability, style, and technology in the 2025 Toyota Tacoma SR5. The 8-Speed Automatic transmission ensures seamless power delivery, while the Rear-Wheel Drive configuration provides responsive handling and confident control.  Elevate your driving experience with a host of advanced features, including Air Conditioning, Rear Window Defroster, Power Steering, Power Windows, Remote Keyless Entry, and Steering Wheel Mounted Audio Controls. The Four-Wheel Independent Suspension and Speed-Sensing Steering ensure a smooth, responsive ride, while the Traction Control and 4-Wheel Disc Brakes with ABS provide added peace of mind.  Safety is a top priority, with the Tacoma SR5 boasting Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, Knee Airbag, Overhead Airbag, and an Emergency Communication System with a 1-year trial of Safety Connect. The Exterior Parking Camera Rear and Auto High-Beam Headlights further enhance your visibility and awareness on the road.  Connectivity is key, and the Tacoma SR5 delivers with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, allowing you to seamlessly sync your smartphone and access your favorite apps, music, and more. The Auto-Dimming Rear-View Mirror, Illuminated Entry, and Tilt/Telescoping Steering Wheel add to the vehicle's user-friendly features, making every drive more comfortable and convenient.  Elevate your driving experience with the 2025 Toyota Tacoma SR5. This exceptional pickup combines rugged capability, advanced technology, and a refined, versatile design to meet all your needs. description: Porsche Palm Springs is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2025 Porsche 911 GT3 Dressed in an evocative Oak Green Metallic Neo and with just 900 miles to its name, this vehicle is a testament to the uncompromising performance and motorsport heritage that Porsche represents.   The 911 GT3 stands as an icon of precision engineering and purposeful design, its Oak Green Metallic Neo exterior offering a bold yet refined expression of Porsches racing DNA. Accented by Wheels Painted in High Gloss California Gold and HD-Matrix Design LED Headlights in Black, this GT3 commands attention with every detail. The Weissach Package underscores its track-focused intent, while Exclusive Design Taillights and an Exclusive Design Fuel Cap add bespoke visual distinction to an already legendary silhouette.     Step inside and the Black interior welcomes you with a driver-focused environment crafted for pure engagement. Folding Lightweight Bucket Seats provide exceptional support, while the Steering Wheel and Gear Lever in Black Leather reinforce the tactile connection between driver and machine. The Steering Column Casing in Leather and Seat Belts in Silver Grey introduce subtle luxury, complemented by the immersive BOSE Surround Sound System for refined acoustics on road or highway.    Engine and Performance: Powering this extraordinary machine is a naturally aspirated 4.0-liter boxer six engine, producing an exhilarating 502 horsepower and 331 lb-ft of torque. Paired with a 6-speed GT Sport Manual Transmission, the GT3 delivers a visceral and engaging driving experience that purists crave. Performance is further enhanced by the Front Axle Lift System, Chrono Package, and an Extended Range Fuel Tank (22.1 gallons), ensuring versatility for both track sessions and long-distance drives.     Key Features:     Weissach Package:  A motorsport-inspired enhancement focused on weight reduction and performance optimization for the ultimate GT3 experience.    6-speed GT Sport Manual Transmission:  Delivering unmatched driver involvement and precision shifting.    Front Axle Lift System:  Adds everyday usability by increasing front-end clearance at the touch of a button.    HD-Matrix Design LED Headlights in Black:  Advanced illumination technology paired with a striking darkened aesthetic.    Folding Lightweight Bucket Seats:  Track-ready seating that balances extreme support with reduced weight.    BOSE Surround Sound System:  Premium audio engineered for clarity and depth throughout the cabin.     This 2025 Porsche 911 GT3 is far more than a sports car; it is a precision instrument engineered for those who demand authenticity, performance, and exclusivity. Available at Porsche Palm Springs, this exceptional GT3 offers a rare opportunity to experience one of the most celebrated drivers cars ever produced.         Porsche Palm Springs is a member of the indiGO Auto Group. Our dealership features a beautiful Porsche Corporate Identity showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detail department, and Porsche accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your new car directly to your home anywhere in the world. Trade-in proposals are always welcome. If you like this vehicle and have questions, simply call, email, or drop by our location at 3735 E Palm Canyon Dr, Palm Springs, CA 92264. description: Why BUY from Paul Miller Audi?     When you choose this BLACK 2025 AUDI Q7  with 9,844 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!     No Accidents!      One Owner!  What this vehicle includes:               Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Audi smartphone interface w/wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring      Come on in to Paul Miller Audi today at 179 US-46 Parsippany NJ 07054 or call  to schedule a test drive!

description: Experience sophistication and performance in this Black 2025 Mazda CX-5 AWD 2.5 S Preferred SUV. Powered by the responsive SKYACTIV-G 2.5L engine with 187hp, this SUV delivers confident all-weather traction with on-demand AWD and a smooth 6-speed shiftable automatic transmission. Enjoy premium features like leather-trimmed upholstery, heated power front seats, a power moonroof, and a 10.25-inch MAZDA CONNECT infotainment system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Stay safe and connected with adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, blind spot monitoring, rear cross traffic alert, and advanced emergency braking with pedestrian detection. Convenience abounds with a power liftgate, auto-dimming rearview mirror, dual-zone automatic climate control, and remote start via the MyMazda app. With standout styling, LED headlights, and a host of thoughtful tech and safety features, this CX-5 is ready for your next adventure. OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Preferred Equipment Group 2LT235/65R17 All-Season Blackwall Tires    Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
